Field deployment
30 Daysof Dahl

A forever-running daily discipline tracker. Check off the daily loadout, bank the streak, survive the 30-day protocol. The log runs forever — the protocol is the crucible.

This is a phone app. There is no desktop version, no account and no cloud — the entire thing installs to your home screen and lives in your phone's own storage, fully offline.

Deploy to your phone
